metadata.name: Stacks Design System
metadata.description: Complete design system with tokens and component definitions extracted from Figma
metadata.author: AI Design System Generator

typography.description: Font families, sizes, weights, and line heights for all text elements
includes: Primary font: DM Sans
Heading font: Poppins
Heading styles: Hero, H1-H4
Body text: Large, Normal, Medium, Small (with bold variants)
Captions: Caption, Hairline Small/Large
Button text: Large, Medium, Small

colors.description: Complete color palette with primitives, semantic tokens, and dark mode support
includes: Primitives: Neutrals, Blues, Reds, Greens, Ambers (10-color ramps)
Semantic: Primary, Secondary, Tertiary, Success, Warning, Error, Info
Semantic Tokens: Background, Surface, Text, Border, Feedback
Interactions: Hover, Active, Focus, Disabled, Overlay
Dark Mode: Complete dark theme support

spacing.description: Spacing scale for padding, margins, gaps, and insets
includes: Tokens from 0 to 96 (0px - 384px)
Semantic shortcuts: xs, sm, md, lg, xl, 2xl, 3xl, 4xl
Specific scales: inset, gap, padding, margin

sizing.description: Size tokens for width, height, and max-width constraints
includes: Component sizes: xs to 6xl
Width presets: min, xs through 4xl, full, screen
Height presets: xs through 3xl, full, screen
Max-width scale: xs through 7xl, full

borderRadius.description: Border radius scale from sharp to fully rounded
includes: Scale: none, xs, sm, md, lg, xl, 2xl, 3xl, 4xl, 5xl, full
Component-specific: button, input, card, modal, chip, avatar, etc.
Semantic: small, medium, large, extraLarge, round, circular
Elevation levels: none, xs, sm, md, lg, xl, 2xl, inner
Focus shadows: default, error, success, warning
Component shadows: button, card, modal, input, popover, tooltip, dropdown

motion.description: Animation durations, easing functions, and transitions
includes: Durations: instant to slowest (0ms - 700ms)
Easing: 20+ easing functions (linear through custom curves)
Transitions: color, background, border, opacity, transform, shadow
Animations: fadeIn/Out, slideIn/Out, scale, pulse, spin

breakpoints.description: Responsive design breakpoints and grid settings
includes: Breakpoints: xs, sm, md, lg, xl, 2xl (320px - 1536px)
Media queries: mobile, tablet, desktop, wide, ultraWide
Accessibility: reducedMotion, highContrast
Grid: 4-column (mobile), 8-column (tablet), 12-column (desktop)

button.description: Primary interactive component for user actions

input.description: Text input field for form data entry

textarea.description: Multi-line text input for longer content

chip.description: Interactive chip for tags and filters

usage.installation: All tokens are defined as JSON objects and can be imported into your design tools or transformed to CSS variables, Tailwind config, or other formats
